title: What Burns the Wisteria
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: Every spring, the Tanaka family's wisteria vine blooms in colors visible only to family members, each hue foretelling a death until the teenage granddaughter sees a color that means the vine itself will die by winter, along with the family's oldest secret.
long_description: Every spring, the Tanaka family's wisteria vine blooms in colors visible only to family members, each hue foretelling a death until the teenage granddaughter sees a color that means the vine itself will die by winter, along with the family's oldest secret.
